strings.ConversionLogLocation: Logs are saved in the Logs folder next to the application.
strings.DragPackageToResonite: Drag this icon into the Resonite window
strings.CheckLog: Please check the log for details.
strings.ExecutablePathUnavailable: Could not determine the application executable path.
strings.DropPrompt: Drag and drop VRM files here
strings.DefaultOutputDirectory: Same folder as the input file
strings.NoExpressionMenu: Do not generate an expression menu
strings.ChooseTransparentMode: Choose how to convert transparent materials
strings.TransparentModeDescription:
Due to Resonite shader behavior, each mode appears as follows.
Alpha: Produces smooth transparency, but may look bright under certain lighting.
Cutout: Uses fully transparent or fully opaque pixels, but blends naturally with lighting.
